title: fraxinus baroniana
intro: Fraxinus baroniana, also known as Baron's ash, is a species of flowering plant in the olive family, native to the mountainous regions of China. The bark and leaves of the Fraxinus baroniana plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fraxinus baroniana include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture, and can also be used to make a topical salve or ointment for skin conditions.
